title: Replace CETA & HOPE logos with newly uploaded versions

requirements.text: Save the uploaded HOPE logo (HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png — circular design with two cupped hands and 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education' text) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hope-logo.png and replace every existing HOPE logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file, preserving the original size and position in each location.

quotes: simply replace the existing ones in the same spots

acceptanceCriteria: The new HOPE logo (two hands / 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education') is displayed in the navbar, hero section, and footer.
No old HOPE logo image remains visible anywhere on the page.
Logo size and alignment are unchanged from Version 5.

requirements.text: Save the uploaded CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust logo (CETA Logo-Photoroom-1.png — circular design with globe, ribbon, and 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust' text) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png and replace every existing CETA logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file, preserving the original size and position in each location.

quotes: simply replace the existing ones in the same spots

acceptanceCriteria: The new CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust logo (globe/ribbon design) is displayed in the navbar, hero section, and footer.
No old CETA logo image remains visible anywhere on the page.
Logo size and alignment are unchanged from Version 5.

constraints: All other content, layout, styling, and functionality must remain exactly as in Version 5.
Do not modify the backend in any way.
Do not alter any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Resizing or repositioning logos beyond matching the existing Version 5 layout.
Any other visual or functional changes to the site.
